license_note: All assessments are public domain (ASRS-v1.1 by WHO) or proprietary BNM tools (attend_catcher_18). No copyrighted assessments (CAARS, etc.) are included.

ASRS_v1_1.authority_note_ko: WHO가 개발한 가장 보편적으로 사용되는 성인 ADHD 선별 도구. DSM-5 기준 18문항 + Part A 6문항 스크리너. 임상 cutoff: Part A ≥ 4점.
ASRS_v1_1.authority_note_en: Most widely used adult ADHD screening tool, developed by WHO. 18 items based on DSM-5 + Part A 6-item screener. Clinical cutoff: Part A ≥ 4.

attend_catcher_18.authority_note_ko: Boston Neuromind 자체 개발 18문항 ADHD 평가. DSM-5-TR A1-A18 직접 매핑. 임상 cutoff: 24점.
attend_catcher_18.authority_note_en: BNM-developed 18-item ADHD assessment. Directly mapped to DSM-5-TR A1-A18. Clinical cutoff: 24.

mapping_formula.note_ko: 초기 가설 매핑. 실제 임상 데이터 누적 후 8주마다 재보정. AI 데이터 기반 점진 학습.
mapping_formula.note_en: Initial heuristic mapping. Recalibrated every 8 weeks with accumulated clinical data. AI data-driven progressive learning.

scenario_score_to_assessment_delta.description_ko: 한 시나리오 점수(0-10)가 평가지에 미치는 추정 영향
scenario_score_to_assessment_delta.description_en: Estimated impact of one scenario score (0-10) on assessment

ASRS_v1_1.note: Per scenario: ASRS estimated change = -0.08 × score. Max -0.8/session.

attend_catcher_18.note: Per scenario: attend_18 estimated change = -0.10 × score. Max -1.0/session.

recalibration.trigger_note_ko: 8주마다 실제 평가지 점수 재측정 → 추정치와 비교 → 공식 자동 보정
recalibration.trigger_note_en: Re-measure actual assessment every 8 weeks → compare with estimate → auto-recalibrate formula
